Form.title: Welcome to The Project Hub
Form.mentor_label: I am available as a mentor

mission_text: A platform built to connect Sudanese talent in Egypt and the diaspora. Build your professional portfolio, connect with complementary skills locally, and attract global mentorship and sponsorship.
slogan: Empowering Sudan's Next Generation of Makers.
hero_subtitle: A platform for Sudanese makers to be seen, build teams, and access mentorship. Create a portfolio that organizes your projects, skills, and resume, then connect with people and opportunities nearby.
mission_body: Empower Sudan's next generation of makers by providing a platform for collaboration, professional development, and opportunity matching.
goal_body: Connect unseen Sudanese talent in the diaspora with peers, mentors, and employers, starting with a focused pilot program.
pilot_body: Starting in Egypt with a 100-person cohort to build trust, measure impact, and refine matching.
steps_tagline: Built for makers, mentors, and sponsors.
step1_desc: Add your story, skills, location, and projects in Arabic or English. Upload a resume or link to past work.
step2_desc: Your projects, skills, and resume are arranged into a clean, shareable profile people can scan quickly.
step3_desc: Find nearby teammates and diaspora mentors. Get recommendations for projects based on your passion and major.
community_body: We highlight projects, help teams form, and make local talent discoverable. The goal is to build confidence, visibility, and real collaboration.
sponsor_body: Companies, donors, and public partners can offer internships, talks, resume reviews, and interview preparation based on local needs.
sponsor_copy: Egypt-first, with pathways to connect Sudanese talent globally once the pilot shows results.
matchmaking_body: Discover makers, mentors, and projects near you. Start with the pilot cohort and build real collaborations.
feature1_desc: Automatically arrange your projects, skills, and resume data into a professional, scannable online profile.
feature2_desc: Connect with makers and professionals in your city (starting with Egypt) who have complementary skills for your projects.
feature3_desc: Gain visibility to sponsors and mentors offering internships, resume reviews, and career insights.

home.hero_title: A premium home for Sudanese makers to build visibility, teams, and momentum.
home.hero_body: Create a portfolio that organizes your projects, skills, and story. Discover nearby collaborators, meet diaspora mentors, and make local talent easier to find.
home.mockup_title: Profiles that make talent easier to discover
home.mockup_query_title: One place for your projects, skills, and local visibility
home.mockup_query_body: The platform turns scattered experience into a clean profile that people can scan, trust, and act on quickly.
home.mockup_context_body: Help unseen talent become easier to find, easier to understand, and easier to connect with across local and diaspora networks.
home.audience_founders_body: Build a clear portfolio that helps collaborators, mentors, and employers understand what you can do at a glance.
home.audience_recruiters_body: Support promising Sudanese talent with sharper visibility into skills, projects, and local needs.
home.audience_investors_body: Create stronger local discovery so teams can form faster and more talent becomes visible in Egypt and beyond.
home.steps_title: From hidden talent to a profile people can actually use
home.steps_intro: The workflow stays simple: tell your story once, let the product shape it into a stronger portfolio, then use matching to connect with people and opportunities nearby.
home.step1_body: Add your story, skills, city, and projects in Arabic or English so your work is easy to understand.
home.step2_title: Turn raw inputs into a polished portfolio
home.step2_body: Organize your resume, projects, and strengths into a clean profile that can be shared quickly.
home.step3_body: Discover nearby teammates, mentors, and sponsor pathways based on your focus, major, and interests.
home.features_intro: Each part of the interface is meant to reduce friction between having potential and being seen, understood, and matched with the right people.
home.feature_search_body: Show projects, tools, skills, and story in a format that people can scan quickly and trust.
home.feature_graph_body: Make nearby makers, mentors, and collaborators easier to find, starting with the Egypt pilot.
home.feature_intro_body: Get recommendations for collaborators and guidance based on shared focus, location, and complementary strengths.
home.feature_context_body: Present enough context upfront that mentors, sponsors, and employers can engage without guesswork.
home.trust_body: The platform should feel private, clear, and useful from the first screen. This is not noise-heavy social media. It is a focused layer for visibility, collaboration, and support.
home.privacy_body: Profiles should help people get discovered without making their data feel exposed, extractive, or treated like inventory.
home.signal_body: Keep the product compact and premium so the focus stays on portfolios, matching, and real opportunity instead of clutter.
home.final_title: Help the right people find your work faster.
home.final_body: Create your maker profile, explore the matching hub, and make it easier for teammates, mentors, and sponsors to see your potential.

matching.title: Find your team, mentors, and projects
matching.subtitle: Based on your location, skills, and passion, we recommend makers and projects built for the pilot cohort in Egypt.
matching.filters_subtitle: These will adapt as your profile grows.
matching.readiness_subtitle: Complete your intake to unlock stronger matches.
matching.recommended_subtitle: We prioritize local collaboration and pilot partners first.
matching.project_form_subtitle: Share a project so makers nearby can join.
matching.filtered_hint: Try clearing filters or selecting Project in the type filter.
matching.no_matches: No matches yet. Update your profile to unlock more recommendations.
matching.discovery_body: Add 2+ projects and a resume to be featured in the pilot spotlight feed.
